title: CVE-2005-1665 — CVSS 5.0 (UNKNOWN)
content:
# CVE-2005-1665

CVSS Score: 5.0 (UNKNOWN)
Published: 2005-05-18T04:00:00.000
CWEs: NVD-CWE-Other

The __VIEWSTATE functionality in Microsoft ASP.NET 1.x, when not cryptographically signed, allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (CPU consumption) via deeply nested markup.

References: http://marc.info/?l=bugtraq&m=111513127704270&w=2, http://scottonwriting.net/sowblog/posts/3747.aspx, http://secunia.com/advisories/15241
